problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: Combining DNA computing for massively parallel search with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
